subcodes.first_line: O gathering of our companions and friends of our souls, our Beloved, the Sun of Truth hath risen from the horizon of oneness and illumineth the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بزم یارانمز و دوستان جانمز جانانمز شمس حقیقت افق احدیتدن طوغدی یر تابان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @mystical themes, @poems and quotation from poetry, @firmness in the Covenant
